positive: A highly stylized, symmetrical celestial woodland scene. Dominant subject is a pair of majestic, luminous moths with intricate, geometric wing patterns, resting on a cluster of bioluminescent fantasy flowers and gnarled, root-covered forest branches. The composition must be central, creating a perfect silhouette against a deep twilight background. Use a color palette of deep indigo, sapphire blue, metallic gold, and ethereal emerald green. The art style should be neo-whimsical botanical illustration meets Art Deco etching, featuring strong line work, high contrast, and flat areas of solid color for print scalability. Ensure the moths and flora have distinct, clean outlines suitable for screen printing or apparel transfers. Dramatic backlighting emanates from behind the flowers, creating a halo effect around the subjects. Perfect for a wearable print.
negative: blurry, noise, grain, artifact, watermark, signature, text, lowres, fuzzy, messy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, tiling, out of frame
